evidence.snippet:
Xsens inertial modules give drones precise orientation, stable flight control, and reliable navigation. With up to 400 Hz orientation output, advanced sensor fusion, and compact OEM designs, Xsens is a trusted choice for UAV developers.
[Explore Inertial Sensors for UAVs](https://www.xsens.com/sensor-modules/xsens-mti-product-selector)

Xsens has a broad portfolio of IMU, AHRS and GNSS/INS + RTK sensor modules. Featuring advanced sensor fusion, they offer high-quality 3D orientation and positioning data.
[![Sensor modules →](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/3446270/5e5f40cd-7ab9-4967-a34f-d83a64a52b9e.png)](https://cta-redirect.hubspot.com/cta/redirect/3446270/5e5f40cd-7ab9-4967-a34f-d83a64a52b9e)

items.notes: IMU, AHRS, GNSS/INS, RTK sensor modules explicitly marketed for drone/UAV navigation and flight stability

products_categories.notes: Xsens sells inertial sensor modules (IMU/AHRS/GNSS-INS) as components to drone OEMs. Motion capture product line is non-drone.

headquarters.notes: Enschede is the first-listed and primary location. Also has offices in El Segundo CA, Halifax NS, and Shanghai.

evidence.snippet:
Drones are expected to fly safely in windy or cluttered environments. To deliver missions reliably - inspection, delivery, mapping, or defense - they need dependable inertial sensing for **flight stability** and **navigation**.
Xsens industrial-grade **IMUs, AHRS, and GNSS/INS + RTK** provide the high-frequency orientation and **state estimation** required for **in-flight stabilization and** **time-synchronized orientation & position**.

### MTi 1-Series
\- Ultra-compact (12 × 12 mm), lightweight and low-power SMD module for space-constrained designs.
\- Delivers reliable orientation and positioning with onboard sensor fusion.
\- AHRS, INS/GNSS or INS/GNSS + RTK options, also available in easy to integrate modules for fast prototyping.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells IMU/AHRS/GNSS-INS sensor modules that drone OEMs integrate into their vehicles. OEM and SMD form factors explicitly marketed.

evidence.snippet:
### MTi 1-Series
\- Ultra-compact (12 × 12 mm), lightweight and low-power SMD module for space-constrained designs.
\- Delivers reliable orientation and positioning with onboard sensor fusion.
\- AHRS, INS/GNSS or INS/GNSS + RTK options, also available in easy to integrate modules for fast prototyping.

### MTi 600 OEM-Series
\- Up to 400 Hz orientation output providing high data rate.
\- OEM form factor, compact and easy to integrate in embedded systems.

**Xsens Avior** - the new standard in OEM IMUs
==============================================
High-performance inertial sensing in a compact, low SWaP-C package - engineered for fast, flexible and seamless system integration.

### Xsens MTi-680G
\- GNSS/INS + RTK rugged module, IP68 housing.
\- Integrated GNSS receiver for easy, plug & play implementation.
\- Time-synced orientation and positioning data.

Xsens Vision Navigator
Xsens Vision Navigator is a Vision-enhanced Inertial Navigation System.

### Next-Generation Xsens Link
The next-generation Xsens Link is built for professionals who demand precision, reliability, and freedom of movement.

products.notes: Drone-relevant products are MTi 1-Series, MTi 600 OEM-Series, Avior, MTi-680G, Sirius, and Vision Navigator.

evidence.snippet: *   Certifications CE, FCC, RoHS, ITAR free

ndaa.notes: Avior certifications list 'ITAR free' but no NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claim in corpus.

evidence.snippet:
### Scalable OEM Solution
Perfect for scaling production across robotics, stabilization platforms, AMRs, and more. From evaluation to production, Xsens Avior scales with your design.

Xsens Inertial Sensor Modules - Product Selector
================================================
With this online product selector, you can explore and compare the solutions that interest you based on functionality, form factor, interfaces, features and performance. [](https://www.xsens.com/sensor-modules/contact-us)

readiness.notes: Full catalog of named SKUs with detailed technical specifications and 'scaling production' language.

tagline: Manufactures inertial measurement units, AHRS, and GNSS/INS navigation modules in compact SMD and OEM form factors for drones, robotics, marine, and defense applications. Product line spans ultra-miniature components (MTi 1-Series, MTi-8) to rugged integrated systems (MTi-680G, Sirius, Avior). NDAA compliance status unknown; no Blue UAS certification identified in public records. Broad commercial footprint (entertainment, sports) but defense/unmanned-systems market presence requires direct customer verification.
